original_image_tags: A typed document page with visible aging and slight discoloration. There are two dark circular punch holes at the top center. The text is typewritten in a vintage font. There are blank lines where specific dates and directions were intended to be filled in but are currently empty.

elements.description: Typed document page with heading 'Incident #193' and a paragraph describing an unidentified flying object sighting in October 1948 near Neubiberg Air Force Base, including details about the object's appearance, speed, and a final evaluation 'B-2'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no real visual content like photographs or diagrams, only typed text.
